title: MadnessCraft
description: If you beat the game with this you shall win a nobel prize!
body:
A modpack focusing on making the game more different, and harder!

**WARNING:CONTAINS SCARY OR DISTURBING MODS!**

Beating the game with all of these mods is really hard, so try your best. If... You... DARE!!!
This modpack could lag if your computer isnt the best, maybe try lowering your graphics!
Multiplayer hasnt been tested yet, use it with caution, and expect bugs. (EDIT: multiplayer has tried to be tested with my friend but he never loaded to my world using essential, if you use essential, if you have patience and a ok pc, you could play with friends! with actual hosters, im not sure, again, will take time to load, but it should work!)

**There are currently a lot of bugs currently, I am gonna test some mods later on and try fixing some of these stupid little bugs!**
And remember...

**ENJOY! :)**
